summary: Staylet stabilization testing completed. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: form validation, navigation, mobile layout, status badges, dashboard counts. All bug fixes and stabilization features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with valid credentials returns token and user
Backend: Property creation with empty name rejected (400)
Backend: Property creation with whitespace-only name rejected (400)
Backend: Property creation with empty address rejected (400)
Backend: Property creation with empty postcode rejected (400)
Backend: Compliance record with empty title rejected (400)
Backend: Compliance record with empty category rejected (400)
Backend: Task with empty title rejected (400)
Backend: Task with whitespace-only title rejected (400)
Backend: Property create and verify in list
Backend: Compliance record create and verify property summary updates
Backend: Task create and verify in list
Backend: Compliant status for expiry > 30 days
Backend: Expiring soon status for expiry <= 30 days
Backend: Overdue status for past expiry
Backend: Dashboard stats match actual database counts
Backend: Dashboard data endpoint returns upcoming expiries and overdue records
Backend: Compliance delete updates list
Backend: Property summary updates after record delete
Backend: Properties list endpoint works
Backend: Property detail endpoint works
Backend: Compliance list endpoint works
Backend: Tasks list endpoint works
Backend: Constants endpoint returns all required constants
Frontend: Property modal shows validation errors for empty name/address/postcode
Frontend: Compliance record modal shows validation error for empty title
Frontend: Task modal shows validation error for empty title
Frontend: Property detail page loads with compliance summary
Frontend: Back button navigates from property detail to properties list
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Properties, Compliance, Tasks, Settings)
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct stats (2 properties, 1 expiring soon, 1 overdue, 0 missing, 1 task due)
Frontend: Dashboard shows overdue alert section with immediate attention warning
Frontend: Dashboard shows Next 5 Expiries section
Frontend: Dashboard shows Tasks Due This Month section
Frontend: Status badges show correct colors (compliant=green, expiring_soon=amber, overdue=red)
Frontend: Mobile layout (375px) displays dashboard correctly
Frontend: Mobile hamburger menu opens sidebar
Frontend: Mobile sidebar closes on close button click
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing was cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stabilization testing completed. All form validation, database writes, data refresh, navigation, mobile layout, status badges, and dashboard counts verified working correctly. Existing test data: 2 properties (Test Property with 3 compliance records, Valid Property with 0 records), 1 recurring task (Test Smoke Alarms). Dashboard shows 2 properties, 1 expiring soon, 1 overdue, 0 missing, 1 task due.

mocked_features.email_reminders: UI toggle exists with 'Coming soon' badge, preference is saved but no actual email sending

database_writes.property_create: Saves correctly and appears in list
database_writes.compliance_create: Saves correctly and updates property summary
database_writes.task_create: Saves correctly and appears in task list

data_refresh.compliance_create: Property summary updates after creating record

navigation.sidebar_links: All navigate to correct pages (Dashboard, Properties, Compliance, Tasks, Billing, Settings)
